title: Arithmetic Operations on Cardinal Numbers
description: A flowchart illustrating the fundamental arithmetic operations (addition, multiplication, exponentiation) for cardinal numbers, showing how the results depend on whether the cardinals are finite or infinite.
relationships: κ + λ = max(κ, λ) for infinite cardinals
κ × λ = max(κ, λ) for infinite cardinals
Exponentiation follows different rules based on base and exponent
